creator: reg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Thu, Jan 20, 2000 at 02:40:26AM -0800, Marc van Woerkom wrote:
> I would prefer if both apps (glib and gtk) behave the same.
> It just looks odd if gtk provides an alias and glib does not.

Something must be broken with my gtk12 port then, because it doesn't
make any link for gtk-config on my machines...  Are you sure this isn't
something of your doing?

Regards,
 -Jeremy
